ul.li: Election Safety: F1 elected because its log is at least as up-to-date as the majority.
Leader Completeness: Entry 50 (Term 3) was committed by Node A and exists on F1, F2, F4. F1 ensures it is never overwritten.
Log Matching: Phase 5 shows the consistency check and back-step mechanism for lagging Node D.

div.p: Timeout Path: Heartbeats cease. Followers start randomized election timers (150-300ms).
